evidence.source_title: Catherine Perez-Shakdam: The 'Israeli Spy' Who 'Infiltrated' MintPress
evidence.description: MintPress CEO Mnar Adley confirmed Perez-Shakdam was a regular contributor between 2014 and 2017, writing under the name Catherine Shakdam.

editorial_notes: She published under the byline 'Catherine Shakdam'. MintPress later distanced itself by framing her contributions as an 'infiltration'.
